hypothesis: Replacing explicit PES forces in SAA with an inference-time energy-guidance term learned via contrastive energy prediction trained solely on metastable-state configurations will yield ASTRA transition-state samples whose committor distributions (median and IQR around 0.5) are statistically indistinguishable from force-based SAA (two-sample Kolmogorov–Smirnov test p>0.05) on alanine dipeptide and chignolin at 300 K.
